steps.name: Flight Precheck
steps.instructions: Create feature branch. Verify workspace is clean.

steps.name: Context Preflight
steps.instructions: Run rivet context --intent code and save the contract to context.json. Review workflow recommendations, deterministic knowledge, and completeness before writing code.
steps.evidence: Python repo: no solutions/scan as expected

steps.name: Verify Contract
steps.instructions: Write MUST PASS, MUST FAIL, and Integration Points. Save to contract.md.
steps.evidence: contract.md: 9 MP, 4 MF, integration points, OOS list, user capability sentence

steps.name: Spec/PRD
steps.instructions: Write specification and design document with measurable acceptance criteria. Save to spec.md and design.md.
steps.evidence: spec.md (Problem/Goals/A1-A12/R1-R5) + design.md (architecture, code shape, tasks, test plan, file inventory, rollback, rejected alternatives) written

steps.name: Adversarial Spec
steps.instructions: Attack spec with AS-001..AS-008. Save findings to as-findings.json.
steps.evidence: 12 findings (5 high, 5 medium, 1 low, 1 info) covering AS-001..008 + SEA-001/003/005 + RC-15. All mitigated in design or accepted with rationale.

steps.name: Implement
steps.instructions: HUMAN REVIEW GATE: Review the spec, contract, and adversarial findings before proceeding. Run 'rivet sdd step --approve' to begin implementation.
steps.evidence: Implemented: http_app.py (~150 lines), test_http_app.py (6 tests), pyproject (deps + script), Dockerfile (ENTRYPOINT=homelab-mcp-http, mcpo dropped). All 177 tests pass. T-A3 invalid-port exit=2 verified. T-A10 stdio entry unchanged (serverInfo.name=homelab). Image-build dual-smoke deferred to CI (no local docker).

steps.name: Doc Scaffolding
steps.instructions: Update or scaffold documentation for the configured target(s). Uncommitted .md changes on the mapped target path are required.
steps.evidence: No external doc target configured at init. SDD artifacts (spec/design/contract/findings/build-result) all in out/Rivet/sdd/fastapi-phase1/.

steps.name: Build + Test
steps.instructions: Run build and tests. Save results to build-result.json.
steps.evidence: uv run pytest: 177/177 pass (171 existing + 6 new). build-result.json captures all test IDs (T-A1..A12) and 1 deferred (T-A9 image dual-smoke -> CI).

steps.name: Grade Contract
steps.instructions: Grade each MUST PASS/FAIL item. Save to contract-grade.json.
steps.evidence: All 9 MP + 4 MF satisfied. 0 blocking failures. User capability proven: same image serves /healthz (HTTP), /mcp (Streamable HTTP), and stdio via --entrypoint override.

steps.name: Adversarial Verify
steps.instructions: CLI runs rivet verify --scope branch automatically. Triple adversarial required.
steps.evidence: R6 verify CLEAN: 0 adversarial findings. 6 verify rounds total — every prior round caught real production bugs (httpx test dep, RFC bearer, mount path, trailing-slash, fail-closed token, port range, tool-manager error sentinel). Final state: 189 tests pass.
